## Properties

| Property    | Attribute   | Description                                                | Type                                     | Default |
| ----------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `content`   | `content`   | Tooltip text content                                       | `string`                                 | `''`    |
| `delay`     | `delay`     | Delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip           | `number`                                 | `150`   |
| `disabled`  | `disabled`  | Disables the tooltip                                       | `boolean`                                | `false` |
| `placement` | `placement` | Preferred placement of the tooltip relative to the trigger | `"bottom" \| "left" \| "right" \| "top"` | `'top'` |
